mapper.sql: vt.id, vt.terminal_code terminalCode, vt.terminal_name terminalName, vt.elder_id elderId, e.name elderName, vt.install_location installLocation, vt.device_ip deviceIp, vt.wake_word wakeWord, vt.volume, vt.firmware_version firmwareVersion, vt.status, vt.last_online_time lastOnlineTime, vt.remark, vt.create_date createDate, vt.update_date updateDate
mapper.select:
select
from t_voice_terminal vt left join t_elder e on vt.elder_id = e.id
and vt.terminal_code like concat('%', #{terminalCode}, '%')
and vt.terminal_name like concat('%', #{terminalName}, '%')
and e.name like concat('%', #{elderName}, '%')
and vt.install_location like concat('%', #{installLocation}, '%')
and vt.status = #{status}
order by vt.status asc, vt.id desc

select
from t_voice_terminal vt left join t_elder e on vt.elder_id = e.id where vt.id = #{id}

select
from t_voice_terminal vt left join t_elder e on vt.elder_id = e.id where vt.terminal_code = #{terminalCode} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into t_voice_terminal (terminal_code, terminal_name, elder_id, install_location, device_ip, wake_word, volume, firmware_version, status, last_online_time, remark, create_date, update_date) values (#{terminalCode}, #{terminalName}, #{elderId}, #{installLocation}, #{deviceIp}, #{wakeWord}, #{volume}, #{firmwareVersion}, #{status}, #{lastOnlineTime}, #{remark}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update t_voice_terminal set terminal_code = #{terminalCode}, terminal_name = #{terminalName}, elder_id = #{elderId}, install_location = #{installLocation}, device_ip = #{deviceIp}, wake_word = #{wakeWord}, volume = #{volume}, firmware_version = #{firmwareVersion}, status = #{status}, last_online_time = #{lastOnlineTime}, remark = #{remark}, update_date = now() where id = #{id}
